name: Hutatma
overview: Hutatma is a ZEE5 Original series starring Anjali Patil, Vaibhav Tatwawaadi, Sachin Khedekar and Arif Zakaria. Based on Meena Deshpande’s novel of the same name, the series narrates the story of how the state of Maharashtra came into existence with Bombay as its capital. Get ready to discover the epic story of the Samyukta Maharashtra Movement and the struggles of the Marathi manus.

trailers.title: Hutatma | Official Trailer | Anjali Patil | A ZEE5 Original | Streaming Now On ZEE5
